---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who has this problem?

Example: "As a freelancer, I need the agent to track billable hours automatically. Currently I have to do this manually."

## Proposed solution

What should the feature do? How should it work from the user's perspective?

## Alternatives considered

Are there existing skills or workarounds that partially solve this? Why aren't they sufficient?

## Implementation notes

Optional. If you have ideas about how to implement this (which skill category it belongs to, what API it would use, rough approach), include them here.

## Priority / impact

How important is this to you? Would you contribute a PR to implement it?
